productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's 22YDS Trainer 2 White Black Red Shoe
description: These stylish white, black and red shoes from adidas are inspired by the 22YDS series and are great for the amateur cricketer and fan. These shoes provide a combination of enhanced cushioning and stability. They give superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. You can also team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperSynthetic leather uppers with perforations for ventilationSynthetic white lace-ups for better FitTPU moulded stripes for supportPadded collar and tongue, soft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole provide all day comfortFoam insole for comfortMidsoleInjection EVA midsole for lightweight cushioningOutsoleToe guard and heel counter provide extra protectionOutsole with aggressive lug pattern and SPEED GRIP for maximum traction and agilityWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
